assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response clearly identifies dev clusters on Rapid channel and prod clusters on Stable channel, and includes a specific section 'Dev Environment Testing' that leverages the dev clusters for validation

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'No node management' and 'No SSH access to nodes' in the key considerations section, and repeatedly emphasizes mandatory resource requests

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: While it mentions checking deprecated API usage and references GKE deprecation insights dashboard, it does not provide specific kubectl commands for checking API deprecations

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'All containers have resource requests (mandatory - pods will be rejected without them)' and calls it 'the #1 cause of post-upgrade issues' in the key considerations

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes 'PDBs configured for critical workloads', 'No bare pods — all managed by Deployments/StatefulSets', and 'terminationGracePeriodSeconds reasonable'

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes specific gcloud command: 'gcloud container clusters describe CLUSTER --zone ZONE --format="value(currentMasterVersion)"'

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes comprehensive workload health checks with kubectl commands for deployments, pods, statefulsets, and application health validation

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Dev Environment Testing' section and explicitly states 'use them to validate your workloads before the Stable channel auto-upgrade hits prod'
Both pre and post-upgrade checklists include monitoring items like Cloud Monitoring, baseline metrics, error rates, latency validation, and logging collection
